name: Auto Repair
label: Auto Repair

vendors.name: Uptown Auto Care
vendors.public_blurb: Independent shop known for thorough diagnostics and OEM-grade parts.
vendors.pricing_strategy_secret: Opens high on parts+labor; concedes when a real competing written bid is cited; floor near mid.
vendors._comment: pricing_strategy_secret is NEVER sent to the negotiator agent or UI.

vendors.name: Tryon Street Garage
vendors.public_blurb: Neighborhood garage — prefers in-person inspection first.
vendors.pricing_strategy_secret: Refuses firm phone quotes; callback after inspection only.
vendors._comment: pricing_strategy_secret is NEVER sent to the negotiator agent or UI.

vendors.name: Budget Wheels Repair
vendors.pricing_strategy_secret: Lowballs labor then layers shop fees, fluids, and recommended extras; may red-flag vs mid.
vendors._comment: pricing_strategy_secret is NEVER sent to the negotiator agent or UI.

common_repair.label: Common auto repair job (parts + labor ballpark)
common_repair.source: vertical-analysis-2026 table (~47% quote variation); labor rate red-flag if >1.6x metro median

red_flag.description: Bait if ≥30% below fair band; also flag labor rate >1.6x metro median.

negotiation_levers: Require full itemization of equipment, labor, refrigerant, permit, and haul-away
Cite only real competing written bids from get_competing_bids (never invent)
Push back on padded or vague fees until line items are clear
Disclose AI/assistant role honestly if asked whether you are a robot
Close every call with a structured outcome: itemized_quote | callback_commitment | documented_decline

booking_terms.label: Confirmed diagnosis
booking_terms.question: What diagnosis and test results support this repair recommendation?

booking_terms.label: Parts grade
booking_terms.question: Are the quoted parts OEM, aftermarket, remanufactured, or used, and what brands are included?

booking_terms.label: Warranty
booking_terms.question: What parts and labor warranty applies to the repair?

booking_terms.label: Complete out-the-door total
booking_terms.question: Does the total include diagnostics, labor, parts, shop supplies, disposal fees, and tax?

booking_terms.label: Authorization limit
booking_terms.question: Will the shop obtain approval before performing any work above this written total?

booking_terms.label: Completion and transport
booking_terms.question: What is the expected completion date, and is a loaner or shuttle included?

glossary.tonnage: Cooling capacity; 1 ton ≈ 12,000 BTU/hr. Typical homes use 2–5 ton units.
glossary.SEER2: Seasonal Energy Efficiency Ratio (updated standard) for AC efficiency.
glossary.callout: Trip/diagnostic fee charged for a tech visit before repair.
glossary.line_set: Copper refrigerant tubing connecting outdoor and indoor units.
glossary.ductwork: Supply/return air paths; leaks reduce efficiency and comfort.
glossary.R-410A: Common residential refrigerant; recovery and recharge are regulated.

demo_defaults.symptom: front brake noise / pad replacement estimate
demo_defaults.notes: Want itemized parts, labor hours, labor rate, shop fees, diagnostic fee.
